text:
Created attachment 235912
Patch for fio

* Switch PORTVERSION to DISTVERSION as recommended by Porters Handbook
* Disable optmization that overrides definitions set by framework
* Output compilation details, don't obfuscate
* Update pkg-plist

Poudriere testport OK 12.3-RELEASE (amd64)
Poudriere testport OK 13.1-RELEASE (i386)
